title: Wool to Dye For
description: This mod turns Wool into Dye through blasting, making dyes renewable through sheep farms.
body:
This is a simple mod that adds the ability to smelt wool using a blast furnace into dye! Its also compatible with create's encased fan blasting.

![The image shows a blast furnace smelting white wool into white dye.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1894f78fae3b430b7177c898c69efbddb5675189.png)

This mod was done for personal reasons, as i wanted to build a sheep farm that also generated dye, but i guess more people could make use of it.
